prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Belts, sheaves & couplings, part of the Equipment & Machinery scope. The observed field condition is: belt tension off (deflection measurement - ME). The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: mfr guides.
title: Tool and material selection: Belts, sheaves & couplings (service call)
